nasb.text: “So I will stretch out My hand against Judah And against all the inhabitants of Jerusalem. And I will cut off the remnant of Baal from this place, And the names of the idolatrous priests along with the priests.

esv.text: “I will stretch out my hand against Judah and against all the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and I will cut off from this place the remnant of Baal and the name of the idolatrous priests along with the priests,

cnv.text: 我必伸手攻擊猶大， 攻擊耶路撒冷所有的居民。 我必從這地方除掉巴力所餘下的， 除掉拜偶像的祭司的名字， 以及耶和華的祭司；

ccb.text: “我必伸手攻击犹大， 以及所有住在耶路撒冷的人， 铲除巴力的余迹及拜偶像之祭司的名号。
